'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=w9WAPpyXppkhJ4OpY4mtJ8GoxUTEPCc20o33EgVMUH0-1775612576-1.0.1.1-R3SOlGidUtOJbXdhIVzvY_Jyv5.GlUjQ10RDHJkQ298"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
